member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.App
member.summary: The main Avalonia application class for C# Speed Rush. Handles application initialisation and main window creation.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.App.Initialize
member.summary: Initialises the application by loading AXAML resources.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.App.OnFrameworkInitializationCompleted
member.summary: Called when the Avalonia framework has completed initialisation. Sets up the main window with its DataContext.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car
member.summary: Abstract base class representing a car in the C# Speed Rush racing game. Each car has unique speed, fuel consumption, and capacity characteristics that affect gameplay strategy.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name of the car.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.MaxSpeed
member.summary: Gets the maximum speed of the car in kilometres per hour.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.FuelConsumptionRate
member.summary: Gets the base fuel consumption rate per turn at maximum speed, in litres.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.FuelCapacity
member.summary: Gets the total fuel tank capacity in litres.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.CurrentFuel
member.summary: Gets or sets the current fuel level in the tank, in litres.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.CurrentSpeed
member.summary: Gets or sets the current speed of the car in kilometres per hour.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.PitStopRefuelAmount
member.summary: Gets the amount of fuel refuelled during a pit stop, in litres.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.PitStopTimePenalty
member.summary: Gets the time penalty in seconds incurred during a pit stop.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.#ctor(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified parameters.
member.param: The display name of the car.
The maximum speed in km/h.
The base fuel consumption rate per turn.
The total fuel tank capacity in litres.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.CalculateFuelUsage(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Calculates the fuel usage for a given player action. Each car subclass implements its own fuel consumption logic with unique multipliers.
member.param: The player action to calculate fuel usage for.
member.returns: The amount of fuel consumed in litres for the given action.
member.exception: Thrown when an unrecognized player action is provided.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.CalculateDistanceGained(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Calculates the distance gained as a fraction of a lap (0.0 to 1.0) for a given player action.
member.param: The player action to calculate distance for.
member.returns: A value between 0.0 and 1.0 representing the fraction of a lap completed.
member.exception: Thrown when an unrecognized player action is provided.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.GetSpeedUpDistance
member.summary: Gets the distance fraction gained when speeding up. Override in subclasses for car-specific values.
member.returns: Distance as a fraction of a lap.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.GetMaintainDistance
member.summary: Gets the distance fraction gained when maintaining speed. Override in subclasses for car-specific values.
member.returns: Distance as a fraction of a lap.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car.ToString
member.summary: Returns a formatted string representation of the car, including its name, max speed, fuel consumption rate, and fuel capacity.
member.returns: A human-readable string describing the car's attributes.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.SportsCar
member.summary: A high-performance sports car with excellent speed but high fuel consumption. Ideal for aggressive racing strategies where speed is prioritised over fuel economy.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.SportsCar.PitStopRefuelAmount
member.summary: Gets the amount of fuel refuelled during a pit stop (20 litres).

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.SportsCar.PitStopTimePenalty
member.summary: Gets the time penalty incurred during a pit stop (10 seconds).

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.SportsCar.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with preset performance characteristics.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.SportsCar.CalculateFuelUsage(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Calculates fuel usage for the Sports Car based on the player action. SpeedUp uses 1.5x the base rate, MaintainSpeed uses 1.0x, and PitStop uses no fuel.
member.param: The player action to calculate fuel for.
member.returns: The fuel consumed in litres.
member.exception: Thrown when an unrecognized action is provided.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.SportsCar.GetSpeedUpDistance
member.summary: Gets the distance fraction gained when speeding up (0.25 of a lap).
member.returns: 0.25 representing 25% of a lap.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.SportsCar.GetMaintainDistance
member.summary: Gets the distance fraction gained when maintaining speed (0.18 of a lap).
member.returns: 0.18 representing 18% of a lap.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.EcoCar
member.summary: An eco-friendly car with moderate speed and excellent fuel efficiency. Best suited for conservative strategies focused on completing the race without running out of fuel.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.EcoCar.PitStopRefuelAmount
member.summary: Gets the amount of fuel refuelled during a pit stop (15 litres).

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.EcoCar.PitStopTimePenalty
member.summary: Gets the time penalty incurred during a pit stop (8 seconds).

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.EcoCar.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with preset eco-friendly performance characteristics.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.EcoCar.CalculateFuelUsage(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Calculates fuel usage for the Eco Car based on the player action. SpeedUp uses 1.4x the base rate, MaintainSpeed uses 0.8x, and PitStop uses no fuel.
member.param: The player action to calculate fuel for.
member.returns: The fuel consumed in litres.
member.exception: Thrown when an unrecognized action is provided.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.EcoCar.GetSpeedUpDistance
member.summary: Gets the distance fraction gained when speeding up (0.18 of a lap).
member.returns: 0.18 representing 18% of a lap.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.EcoCar.GetMaintainDistance
member.summary: Gets the distance fraction gained when maintaining speed (0.15 of a lap).
member.returns: 0.15 representing 15% of a lap.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.MuscleCar
member.summary: A powerful muscle car with high speed and a large fuel tank, but very high fuel consumption. Offers the most distance per turn when speeding up, but burns through fuel quickly.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.MuscleCar.PitStopRefuelAmount
member.summary: Gets the amount of fuel refuelled during a pit stop (25 litres).

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.MuscleCar.PitStopTimePenalty
member.summary: Gets the time penalty incurred during a pit stop (12 seconds).

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.MuscleCar.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with preset high-power performance characteristics.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.MuscleCar.CalculateFuelUsage(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Calculates fuel usage for the Muscle Car based on the player action. SpeedUp uses 1.6x the base rate, MaintainSpeed uses 1.1x, and PitStop uses no fuel.
member.param: The player action to calculate fuel for.
member.returns: The fuel consumed in litres.
member.exception: Thrown when an unrecognized action is provided.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.MuscleCar.GetSpeedUpDistance
member.summary: Gets the distance fraction gained when speeding up (0.30 of a lap).
member.returns: 0.30 representing 30% of a lap.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.MuscleCar.GetMaintainDistance
member.summary: Gets the distance fraction gained when maintaining speed (0.20 of a lap).
member.returns: 0.20 representing 20% of a lap.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction
member.summary: Represents a player action that can be taken each turn during the race.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction.SpeedUp
member.summary: Increase speed to gain more distance but consume more fuel.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction.MaintainSpeed
member.summary: Maintain current speed for a balanced distance and fuel trade-off.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction.PitStop
member.summary: Make a pit stop to refuel the car at the cost of time.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceState
member.summary: Represents the current state of the race.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceState.NotStarted
member.summary: The race has not yet started.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceState.InProgress
member.summary: The race is currently in progress.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceState.Finished
member.summary: The race has been completed successfully (all laps finished).

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceState.OutOfFuel
member.summary: The race ended because the car ran out of fuel.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceState.OutOfTime
member.summary: The race ended because the timer expired.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.LapRecord
member.summary: Stores information about a single lap during the race, including time spent, fuel consumed, and the action taken by the player.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.LapRecord.LapNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the lap number this record corresponds to.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.LapRecord.TimeUsed
member.summary: Gets or sets the time in seconds used during this lap segment.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.LapRecord.FuelUsed
member.summary: Gets or sets the amount of fuel consumed during this lap segment.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.LapRecord.Action
member.summary: Gets or sets the player action taken during this lap segment.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.LapRecord.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double,CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The lap number.
The time used in seconds.
The fuel consumed in litres.
The player action taken.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager
member.summary: Manages the core game loop for a C# Speed Rush race. Handles turn processing, fuel management, time tracking, lap progression, and event logging.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.ActiveCar
member.summary: Gets the car currently being raced.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.ActiveTrack
member.summary: Gets the track on which the race is taking place.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.TimeRemaining
member.summary: Gets or sets the remaining time in seconds before the race ends due to timeout.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.TotalTime
member.summary: Gets the total time allotted for the race in seconds.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.State
member.summary: Gets or sets the current state of the race.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.LapHistory
member.summary: Gets the history of all lap records recorded during the race.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.EventLog
member.summary: Gets the event log queue containing the most recent race events (max 5).

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.TurnNumber
member.summary: Gets the current turn number.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.#ctor(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car,CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The car selected by the player for the race.
The track on which the race will take place.
The total time in seconds allowed for the race (default: 300).

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.StartRace
member.summary: Starts the race by setting the state to and logging the start event.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.ProcessTurn(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Processes a single turn of the race based on the player's chosen action. Updates fuel, distance, time, and race state accordingly.
member.param: The action chosen by the player for this turn.
member.returns: A containing the outcome of the turn.
member.exception: Thrown when the race has not started, or when a pit stop is attempted while the fuel tank is already at 90% capacity or above.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.TickOneSecond
member.summary: Subtracts one second from the remaining time. Used by the UI timer tick. Updates the race state to OutOfTime if time runs out.
member.returns: true if the race ended due to time expiring; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.CalculateTimeForAction(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Calculates the time cost in seconds for a given player action.
member.param: The player action.
member.returns: The time cost in seconds.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.UpdateSpeed(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Updates the car's current speed based on the player's action.
member.param: The player action taken.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.GenerateEventMessage(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction,System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a human-readable event message for the event log.
member.param: The action taken.
The fuel consumed.
The distance gained as a lap fraction.
Whether a lap was completed.
member.returns: A formatted event message string.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.GetActionVerb(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Gets a human-readable verb for the given player action.
member.param: The player action.
member.returns: A string describing the action.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.AddEventLog(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a message to the event log queue, removing the oldest entry if the queue exceeds the max size.
member.param: The event message to log.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.StoreLapRecord(System.Double,System.Double,CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Stores a lap record in the lap history.
member.param: The fuel consumed during the turn.
The time used during the turn.
The action taken during the turn.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager.CreateResult(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a from the current game state.
member.param: Whether a lap was completed this turn.
The status message for this result.
member.returns: A new reflecting the current state.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceResult
member.summary: Represents the result of processing a single turn in the race. Contains all relevant state information after the turn has been executed.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceResult.LapCompleted
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a lap was completed during this turn.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceResult.CurrentLap
member.summary: Gets or sets the current lap number after the turn was processed.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceResult.FuelRemaining
member.summary: Gets or sets the remaining fuel in litres after the turn was processed.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceResult.TimeRemaining
member.summary: Gets or sets the remaining time in seconds after the turn was processed.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceResult.State
member.summary: Gets or sets the current state of the race after the turn was processed.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceResult.StatusMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets a human-readable status message describing what happened during the turn.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceResult.ProgressBar
member.summary: Gets or sets an ASCII progress bar representing the current lap progress.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double,CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceState,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct with all fields.
member.param: Whether a lap was completed this turn.
The current lap number.
The remaining fuel in litres.
The remaining time in seconds.
The current race state.
A description of what happened.
The ASCII progress bar string.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track
member.summary: Represents a racing track in the C# Speed Rush game. Manages lap progression, progress within the current lap, and provides visual progress display.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the track.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track.TotalLaps
member.summary: Gets the total number of laps required to complete the race.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track.LapDistance
member.summary: Gets the distance of each lap in kilometres.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track.CurrentLap
member.summary: Gets or sets the current lap number (1-based). Starts at 1 and increments each time a full lap is completed.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track.LapProgress
member.summary: Gets or sets the progress within the current lap as a fraction from 0.0 to 1.0. When this reaches or exceeds 1.0, a lap is completed.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The display name of the track.
The total number of laps for the race (default: 5).
The distance of each lap in kilometres (default: 5.0).

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track.AdvanceLap(System.Double)
member.summary: Advances the track progress by the specified amount. If the progress within the current lap reaches or exceeds 1.0, the current lap is incremented and the excess progress carries over.
member.param: The fraction of a lap gained (0.0 to 1.0+).
member.returns: true if a lap was completed during this advance; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track.IsRaceComplete
member.summary: Determines whether the race is complete by checking if all laps have been finished.
member.returns: true if the current lap exceeds the total number of laps; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track.GetProgressBar(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates an ASCII progress bar representing the current progress within the active lap.
member.param: The total character width of the progress bar (default: 20).
member.returns: A string like [=====> ] 25% showing current lap progress.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Track.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the track including its name, lap count, and distance.
member.returns: A formatted string describing the track.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Program
member.summary: Application entry point for the C# Speed Rush desktop application.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Program.Main(System.String[])
member.summary: The main entry point for the application. Initialises and runs the Avalonia UI framework.
member.param: Command-line arguments passed to the application.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Program.BuildAvaloniaApp
member.summary: Builds and configures the Avalonia application with the Fluent theme and default font.
member.returns: An configured for the C# Speed Rush application.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for the car selection screen. Allows the player to browse available cars, view their stats, and start a race with the selected car.

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel.AvailableCars
member.summary: Gets the collection of available cars for the player to choose from.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel._selectedCar
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently selected car. When changed, updates the car details display.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel._carDetails
member.summary: Gets or sets the formatted multi-line string displaying the selected car's statistics.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel._statusMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error or status message displayed to the user.

member.name: E:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel.StartRaceRequested
member.summary: Event raised when the user wants to start a race with the selected car. The event passes the created instance.

member.name: E:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel.GoBackRequested
member.summary: Event raised when the user wants to go back to the main menu.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Populates the available cars with one instance of each car type.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel.StartRace
member.summary: Command that validates the car selection and starts the race. Creates a with the selected car and a default track.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel.GoBack
member.summary: Command that navigates back to the main menu.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel.OnSelectedCarChanged(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.Car)
member.summary: Called when the property changes. Updates the display with the newly selected car's statistics.
member.param: The newly selected car.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel.startRaceCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel.StartRaceCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel.goBackCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.CarSelectionViewModel.GoBackCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for the main window of the C# Speed Rush application. Provides commands for navigating to the car selection screen and viewing game instructions.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel._showInstructions
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the instructions overlay is visible.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel._instructionsText
member.summary: Gets the game instructions text displayed in the about/instructions overlay.

member.name: E:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.NavigateToCarSelection
member.summary: Event raised when the user wants to navigate to the car selection screen.

member.name: E:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.QuitRequested
member.summary: Event raised when the user wants to quit the application.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.StartRace
member.summary: Command that navigates to the car selection screen to begin a new race.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.ToggleInstructions
member.summary: Command that toggles the visibility of the instructions overlay.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.Quit
member.summary: Command that requests the application to quit.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.startRaceCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.StartRaceCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.toggleInstructionsCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.ToggleInstructionsCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.quitCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.MainWindowViewModel.QuitCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for the race window. Manages the race state, player actions, and all display properties bound to the race UI including fuel, time, speed, progress, and event logging.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._raceManager
member.summary: The race manager instance controlling the game logic.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._lapDisplay
member.summary: Gets the display string for the current lap (e.g., "Lap 2 / 5").

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._fuelLevel
member.summary: Gets the fuel level as a value from 0 to 100 for binding to a ProgressBar.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._fuelPercentage
member.summary: Gets the fuel percentage as a formatted string for display labels.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._timeRemaining
member.summary: Gets the raw remaining time in seconds.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._timePercentage
member.summary: Gets the remaining time as a percentage (0–100) for binding to a ProgressBar.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._speedStatus
member.summary: Gets the current speed status display string.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._progressBarDisplay
member.summary: Gets the ASCII progress bar display showing lap progress.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._eventLogDisplay
member.summary: Gets the event log display string (last 5 events joined by newlines).

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._statusMessage
member.summary: Gets the status message shown to the player (coloured based on race state).

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._actionsEnabled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether player action buttons are enabled.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._speedUpEnabled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the Speed Up button is enabled.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._maintainEnabled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the Maintain Speed button is enabled.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._pitStopEnabled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the Pit Stop button is enabled.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._isRaceOver
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the race has ended (for UI state changes).

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._raceSummary
member.summary: Gets the race summary text displayed when the race ends.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._isPositiveStatus
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the status message represents a positive outcome.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._carName
member.summary: Gets the name of the car being raced, for display in the UI header.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel._trackName
member.summary: Gets the name of the track, for display in the UI header.

member.name: E:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.ReturnToMenuRequested
member.summary: Event raised when the player wants to return to the main menu.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.#ctor(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified race manager.
member.param: The race manager controlling the game logic.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.SpeedUp
member.summary: Command that processes a Speed Up action for the current turn.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.MaintainSpeed
member.summary: Command that processes a Maintain Speed action for the current turn.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.PitStop
member.summary: Command that processes a Pit Stop action for the current turn.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.ReturnToMenu
member.summary: Command that returns to the main menu.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.ProcessAction(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Processes a player action by calling the race manager and updating all UI properties. Catches exceptions and displays user-friendly error messages.
member.param: The player action to process.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.HandleRaceEnd(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceResult)
member.summary: Handles the end of the race by generating a summary and disabling actions.
member.param: The final race result.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.OnTimerTick
member.summary: Called by an external timer tick (once per second) to update the countdown.
member.returns: true if the race ended due to time expiring; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.UpdateAllProperties
member.summary: Updates all bindable properties to reflect the current race manager state.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.speedUpCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.SpeedUpCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.maintainSpeedCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.MaintainSpeedCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.pitStopCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.PitStopCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.returnToMenuCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:CSharpNeedforSpeed.ViewModels.RaceWindowViewModel.ReturnToMenuCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.CarSelectionWindow
member.summary: Code-behind for the car selection window. Handles navigation events for starting a race or going back to the main menu.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.CarSelectionWindow._viewModel
member.summary: The ViewModel instance for this window.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.CarSelectionWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Sets up the DataContext and subscribes to navigation events.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.CarSelectionWindow.OnStartRaceRequested(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager)
member.summary: Handles the start race event by opening the race window with the provided race manager.
member.param: The configured race manager for the new race.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.CarSelectionWindow.OnGoBackRequested
member.summary: Handles the go back event by closing this window (returns to main menu).

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.CarSelectionWindow.InitializeComponent(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wires up the controls and optionally loads XAML markup and attaches dev tools (if Avalonia.Diagnostics package is referenced).
member.param: Should the XAML be loaded into the component.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.MainWindow
member.summary: Code-behind for the main window of the C# Speed Rush application. Handles navigation events from the ViewModel to open child windows.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.MainWindow._viewModel
member.summary: The ViewModel instance for this window.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.MainWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Sets up the DataContext and subscribes to navigation events.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.MainWindow.OnNavigateToCarSelection
member.summary: Handles navigation to the car selection screen by hiding the main window and opening the car selection window.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.MainWindow.OnQuitRequested
member.summary: Handles the quit request by closing the main window and exiting the application.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.MainWindow.InitializeComponent(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wires up the controls and optionally loads XAML markup and attaches dev tools (if Avalonia.Diagnostics package is referenced).
member.param: Should the XAML be loaded into the component.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.RaceWindow
member.summary: Code-behind for the race window. Manages the race timer and navigation events.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.RaceWindow._viewModel
member.summary: The ViewModel instance for this window.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.RaceWindow._timer
member.summary: Timer that ticks every second to count down the remaining race time.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.RaceWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Required by Avalonia AXAML loader. Use the overload with RaceManager for actual gameplay.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.RaceWindow.#ctor(CSharpNeedforSpeed.Models.RaceManager)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified race manager.
member.param: The race manager controlling the game logic.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.RaceWindow.OnTimerTick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the timer tick event by updating the ViewModel countdown. Stops the timer if the race has ended.
member.param: The event sender.
The event arguments.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.RaceWindow.OnReturnToMenu
member.summary: Handles the return to menu event by stopping the timer and closing the window.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.RaceWindow.InitializeComponent(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wires up the controls and optionally loads XAML markup and attaches dev tools (if Avalonia.Diagnostics package is referenced).
member.param: Should the XAML be loaded into the component.

member.name: T:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.BoolToColorConverter
member.summary: Converts a boolean value to a colour brush for status message display. True (positive) maps to cyan/blue; false (negative) maps to red.

member.name: F:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.BoolToColorConverter.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance of the converter for use in AXAML bindings.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.BoolToColorConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a boolean to a .
member.param: The boolean value to convert.
The target type (ignored).
An optional parameter (ignored).
The culture info (ignored).
member.returns: A green brush for true, red brush for false.

member.name: M:CSharpNeedforSpeed.Views.BoolToColorConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Not implemented. One-way binding only.
member.param: The value to convert back.
The target type.
An optional parameter.
The culture info.
member.returns: Not supported.

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs
member.summary: A helper type providing cached, reusable instances for all properties generated with .
